name: Vegetable Rye Pancakes
recipeIngredient: 2-3 tbsp finely chopped red bell pepper
1/2 Cup soy or rice milk (I used EdenSo yogurt)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine dry ingredients in a small bowl and mix in the liquid.
2. Let the batter stand for a few minutes.
3. Heat a skillet or griddle over medium flame.
4. Grease the skillet lightly with butter or your preferred low-fat greasing method.
5. Pour the batter onto the hot griddle to form 4 pancakes.
6. Cook the pancakes until they are browned on the bottom, then turn and cook for another minute on the other side.
7. Remove from heat and serve with a sweet fruit sauce or enjoy by themselves.
The pancakes will have a crisp crust and a chewy inside.
